description_long: This SUV features a highly angular, geometric design with a metallic silver-gray body and a distinctive wedge-shaped profile. The roof and rear bed area are covered with dark, likely tinted, glass or composite panels, giving it a futuristic and robust appearance. The windows are large and sharply contoured, with a continuous line running from the front windshield to the rear. The wheels are large, dark, and polygonal, matching the overall angular aesthetic of the vehicle. The front and rear ends are flat and minimalistic, with thin horizontal light bars and no visible grille. The interior appears spacious, with visible seating and a dashboard, suggesting a utilitarian yet modern approach.
description: A futuristic, angular SUV with a metallic silver-gray body, dark glass roof panels, and polygonal wheels. The design is minimalistic and robust, with large windows and a wedge-shaped profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, angular nose, wide windshield, and minimalistic light bar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wedge-shaped profile, large windows, and polygonal wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back, dark rear panel, and thin horizontal taillight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same angular profile, glass roof, and geometric wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Polygonal, dark wheels with a multi-faceted, geometric pattern
